{{Infobox artifact
| name = Wraith Horn
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Wraith]] Horn is a wide-mouthed trumpet crafted from the [[binding]] of [[Subject One]]. Designed to look like a natural seashell through intricate carvings, the object possesses an [[aura]] of immense strength and emits a powerful metallic scent. It functions as a vital lifeline for [[Reigan Shen]], who keeps it within his [[soulspace]]. The artifact has the capacity to warp the surrounding atmosphere, causing local wildlife to transform into minor [[dreadbeasts]]. Its primary intended function is to allow a user to issue commands to the [[Dreadgods]] by projecting a call that sounds as if it originates from the [[Slumbering Wraith]] itself. While research and certain inheritances suggest the horn can force these entities into submission, its effectiveness may be limited in duration.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Constructed from the [[binding]] of [[Subject One]], the Wraith Horn is a wide-mouthed trumpet with the power to broadcast calls that appear to originate from the [[Slumbering Wraith]]. This artifact is capable of commanding [[Dreadgods]] and serves as a tool that enables these entities to travel through space. [[Reigan Shen]] maintains the item within his [[soulspace]] as a form of [[life]] insurance, ultimately relying on it as his personal lifeline.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wraith Horn]] is a wide-mouthed trumpet made from [[Subject One]]'s [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wraith Horn]] can send a call that reaches other [[Dreadgods]] as if it came from the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wraith Horn]] is an item Reigan keeps in his [[soulspace]] as [[life]] insurance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wraith Horn]] is capable of commanding the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wraith Horn]] is a tool that allows [[Dreadgods]] to travel through space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wraith Horn]] is [[Reigan Shen]]'s lifeline.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
